scripts.build: npm run build:preload && vite build && npm run build:clean
scripts.build:clean: find dist -name '.DS_Store' -delete && find dist -name '*.map' -delete && rm -f dist/preload/sql-wasm.wasm && find dist/preload/node_modules/sql.js -type f ! -name 'sql-wasm.wasm' ! -name 'sql-wasm.js' ! -name 'package.json' -delete && find dist/preload/node_modules/sql.js -type d -empty -delete
